sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Racing game; sub-pixel data not available in sources.

special_mechanics.name: Tire Management
special_mechanics.description: Mandatory tire changes in pit lane during races. Player can choose hard, soft, or rain tires based on weather conditions.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Customization
special_mechanics.description: Pre-race vehicle setup including spoilers, tire selection, and gearbox adjustments.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Racing game with no documented jump physics or character movement parameters in available sources. Game is primarily vehicle-based (Formula One cars). Wikipedia article focuses on gameplay features, licensing, and reception rather than physics mechanics.
